entity.summary: Hedera decentralized exchange and protocol suite providing automated-market-maker token swaps, liquidity pools, NFT-linked pools, and current on-chain spot trading through HSuite network services.
entity.notes: The current first-party HSuite application domain remains reachable and the former hsuite.finance website redirects to it. DefiLlama classifies HbarSuite as an audited Hedera AMM DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day exchange volume. Open-source adapter code queries dedicated HbarSuite mainnet service nodes and DEX analytics tickers. Confidence remains medium because detailed first-party exchange documentation was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: HSuite official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party HSuite application domain remains reachable and identifies the current HSuite product surface; the former hsuite.finance domain redirects to this application.

evidence.title: HbarSuite metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Current protocol profile classifies HbarSuite as an audited Hedera AMM DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: HbarSuite DEX TVL adapter
evidence.notes: Open-source adapter implementation queries dedicated HbarSuite mainnet service nodes and the /dex/analytics/tickers endpoint for current liquidity-pool data, corroborating the Hedera DEX identity and live infrastructure.
